node.statement: STEP: Using g_{π,σ} = log_d G_{π,σ} - log_d G̃_{π,σ} and k=rN, simplify to get Eq.(9): E_U Tr(ρ_B^2) = d^{-(g_{s,e}+1)N} + d^{-(g_{s,s}+r)N} and E_U Tr(ρ_{RB}^2) = d^{-(g_{s,e}+1+r)N} + d^{-g_{s,s}N}. Taking -log_d of dominant terms: I_c/N = min(g_{s,e}+1, g_{s,s}+r) - min(g_{s,e}+1+r, g_{s,s}). [Eq.(10), verified at line 196]
